pi_items.source: Verified by reading examples/ninja_trader_env/data/SPY.Last.txt — file exists with 502 lines of SPY daily OHLCV data. The import_data.ps1 script imports SPY.Last.txt into NinjaTrader's db/day/SPY directory. Cross-referenced: Jan 3 2023 close=380.82 matches Yahoo Finance exactly; Jun 30 2023 close=443.28 matches exactly; Dec 31 2024 close=586.08 deviates ~1.13% from real Yahoo value of 579.54.

pi_items.verified_value: SampleMACrossOver (also found as SampleMACrossover in other tasks — NinjaTrader 8's built-in strategy may be case-insensitive; both forms work)
pi_items.source: Verified from multiple sources: (1) backtest_strategy_and_export/task.json uses 'SampleMACrossOver'; (2) optimize_strategy_parameters/validated_pi.json marks 'SampleMACrossOver' as verified; (3) develop_and_backtest_ema_strategy/validated_pi.json confirms 'SampleMACrossover is a documented NinjaTrader 8 example strategy using 10-bar and 25-bar moving average crossover logic'. The strategy is a built-in NinjaTrader 8 sample that ships with all installations.

The SPY.Last.txt data file format is yyyyMMdd;O;H;L;C;V with one bar per trading day. NinjaTrader imports this as Day-period bars. Confirmed by import_data.ps1 which imports into NinjaTrader's db/day/ directory structure.

pi_items.verified_value: 2023-01-03 (first trading day; Jan 1 is a holiday)
pi_items.source: Parsed SPY.Last.txt: first line is '20230103;384.37;386.43;377.83;380.82;74850700'. January 1 2023 was a Sunday/holiday. The metadata says 2023-01-01 which is the conventional way to specify 'start of 2023' — NinjaTrader will use the first available bar which is 2023-01-03.
Parsed SPY.Last.txt: last line is '20241231;589.91;590.64;584.42;586.08;57052700'. The data extends exactly to December 31, 2024.

The task description specifies 'Optimize the Fast parameter from 5 to 25 (step 5)'. Min=5 is consistent. The SampleMACrossOver strategy's Fast parameter accepts integer period values. 5 is a valid SMA period.
Task description specifies 'from 5 to 25 (step 5)'. Max=25 is consistent. This generates Fast values: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25 (5 values).
Task description specifies 'step 5'. Step=5 generates values 5,10,15,20,25 — 5 distinct values. Consistent with expected_combinations calculation.
Task description specifies 'Slow parameter from 30 to 60 (step 10)'. Min=30 is consistent.
Task description specifies 'from 30 to 60 (step 10)'. Max=60 is consistent. This generates Slow values: 30, 40, 50, 60 (4 values).
Task description specifies 'step 10'. Step=10 generates values 30,40,50,60 — 4 distinct values.
Computed: Fast has 5 values (5,10,15,20,25) x Slow has 4 values (30,40,50,60) = 20 combinations. Verified by Python computation: len(range(5,26,5)) * len(range(30,61,10)) = 5 * 4 = 20.

Consistent between task.json description, metadata, setup_task.ps1 cleanup (line 31), and export_result.ps1 parsing (line 8). The output directory C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks is created by setup_ninjatrader.ps1 (post_start) and verified by setup_task.ps1.

Consistent between task.json description, metadata, setup_task.ps1 cleanup (line 31), and export_result.ps1 CSV parsing (line 67). Path is within the NinjaTraderTasks directory which is created and writable.

Consistent between task.json description, metadata, setup_task.ps1 which cleans StrategyQualification* workspace files (line 59), and export_result.ps1 which checks for StrategyQualification.xml (line 121). NinjaTrader saves workspaces as XML files in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces\.

pi_items.verified_value: Primarily real Yahoo Finance data with minor deviations in late 2024
pi_items.source: Cross-referenced SPY.Last.txt against known Yahoo Finance closing prices: Jan 3 2023 close=380.82 (exact match), Jun 30 2023 close=443.28 (exact match), Dec 31 2024 close=586.08 vs real 579.54 (1.13% deviation). The env.json description says 'real Yahoo Finance data'. The import_data.ps1 header says 'Yahoo Finance historical data'. Early 2023 data matches exactly; late 2024 data has ~1% drift suggesting data may have been generated before actual prices were known, or slightly adjusted.
Counted lines in SPY.Last.txt: 502 lines. Split: 250 bars in 2023, 252 bars in 2024. This is consistent with US equity market trading day counts (~250-252 per year).

Confirmed by install_ninjatrader.ps1 line 4: 'Installation script for NinjaTrader 8 (v8.0.28.0)'. This version specifically does NOT require mandatory login (unlike 8.1.x). Installed from NinjaTrader.Install.V8.msi in the data directory.
Parsed first line of SPY.Last.txt. Close of 380.82 matches Yahoo Finance SPY close on Jan 3, 2023 exactly.
Parsed last line of SPY.Last.txt. Close of 586.08 is ~1.13% higher than real Yahoo Finance SPY close of ~579.54 on Dec 31, 2024.

pi_items.verified_value: Strategy Analyzer is available in NinjaTrader 8.0.28.0, accessible via New menu in Control Center
pi_items.source: Verified by: (1) existing tasks optimize_strategy_parameters, run_monte_carlo_analysis, configure_basket_backtest all use Strategy Analyzer successfully; (2) agent trajectories in all_runs/evals_gemini_ninja_trader/ show the agent opening Strategy Analyzer; (3) optimize_strategy_parameters/validated_pi.json marks 'strategy_analyzer_available' as verified.

pi_items.verified_value: NinjaTrader Strategy Analyzer optimization results display in a grid with columns including: Strategy, Instrument, Fast, Slow, Net Profit, Max Drawdown, Profit Factor, Total Trades, etc. The grid can be sorted by clicking column headers.
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 documentation and confirmed by agent trajectory in all_runs/evals_gemini_ninja_trader/gemini-3-flash-preview/optimize_strategy_parameters/ where the agent configured optimization parameters and attempted to run it.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires running a parameter optimization of the SampleMACrossOver strategy in NinjaTrader 8's Strategy Analyzer on SPY Daily bars from January 2023 to December 2024. The environment has 502 daily bars of SPY data pre-loaded (first bar: 2023-01-03 C=380.82, last bar: 2024-12-31 C=586.08, sourced from Yahoo Finance with ~1% deviation in late 2024 prices). The optimization sweeps Fast from 5 to 25 (step 5, yielding 5 values: 5,10,15,20,25) and Slow from 30 to 60 (step 10, yielding 4 values: 30,40,50,60), producing exactly 20 parameter combinations. The SampleMACrossOver is a built-in NinjaTrader 8 strategy that buys when the Fast-period SMA crosses above the Slow-period SMA and sells on the reverse crossover. NinjaTrader version is 8.0.28.0 which does not require login. The Strategy Analyzer Run button is located on the toolbar at the top of the window (not in the scrollable settings panel). After optimization, the agent must read the results grid, identify the highest Net Profit row, record Fast, Slow, Net Profit, and Max Drawdown to qualification_report.txt, then run a fresh backtest with those exact parameters and export the execution list to qualified_trades.csv. Finally, a SPY Daily chart must be created with two SMA indicators matching the optimal Fast and Slow periods, and the workspace saved as 'StrategyQualification'. The key verification mechanism is cross-referencing: the SMA periods on the chart must match the values recorded in the qualification_report.txt file.
